commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a WhatsApp `listGroupsLive` directory implementation backed by Baileys `groupFetchAllParticipating()`, registers it on the channel adapter, adds directory tests for live/fallback/query/limit behavior, and updates one voice-call test mock type.

PR surface: Source +48, Tests +235. Total +283 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main registers only config-backed WhatsApp `listGroups`, while directory callers prefer live methods when present, so an empty `channels.whatsapp.groups` map has no current path to enumerate live memberships.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-side real behavior proof and normal maintainer review, not a narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to automate.

target.title: fix(whatsapp): add listGroupsLive for real-time group directory
target.body:
## Root Cause

The WhatsApp channel directory adapter only registered `listGroups` (which reads from the config map `channels.whatsapp.groups`) but did **not** register `listGroupsLive`. The CLI (and other consumers) prefer `listGroupsLive` when available, so users who have active WhatsApp group memberships but an empty config-based groups map would see an empty directory. No `listGroupsLive` implementation existed for WhatsApp.

## Summary

- Bug: WhatsApp directory `/groups` returned empty even when the account is a member of groups, because only the config-backed `listGroups` was wired up but not the live-fetch variant.
- This PR adds `listWhatsAppDirectoryGroupsLive` that fetches groups from the Baileys socket via `groupFetchAllParticipating()`, with graceful fallback to config when the socket is unavailable or throws. The new function is registered in the channel directory adapter.
- Fixes #76722

## Revision (2026-06-20)

- Fixed a P2 issue where live groups were filtered by JID only, so `--query "Family"` would not match a group named "Family Chat". Now builds entries first and filters by both JID and subject name (matching Discord/Slack live directory behavior).
- Commit: `e7ac40ee0e`

## Verification

- `pnpm test extensions/whatsapp/src/directory-config.test.ts` — 8/8 passed (6 new tests + 2 existing; +1 test for name-based filtering)
- `pnpm tsgo:test` — passed (type check)
- `pnpm lint:extensions:bundled` — passed
- Autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- CI: The `checks-node-core-tooling` failure is an infrastructure/flaky issue unrelated to this PR (only touches `extensions/whatsapp/`)

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: WhatsApp directory `/groups` now returns the account's real group memberships fetched live from the WhatsApp connection, filtered by both JID and group name.
Real environment tested: Linux, Node 22, branch `fix/issue-76722-whatsapp-directory-groups-live` commit `e7ac40ee0e`
Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```bash
pnpm test extensions/whatsapp/src/directory-config.test.ts
pnpm tsgo:test
pnpm lint:extensions:bundled
```
Evidence after fix:
```console
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/whatsapp/src/directory-config.test.ts

 RUN  v4.1.8

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  8 passed (8)
   Start at  00:50:52
   Duration  25.63s
```
Observed result after fix: All 8 tests pass including the new test for name-based query filtering. Type check and lint pass cleanly.
What was not tested: Live E2E with a real WhatsApp account (requires Crabbox with WhatsApp auth); no WhatsApp directory binary/E2E test infrastructure exists.
